prompt: Keep the woman EXACTLY as she is in the photo — her face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, hands, the leather/straw bag, and especially her fine NAVY-AND-WHITE PINSTRIPE cotton midi dress — completely unchanged. Do NOT repaint, restyle, or alter her face or identity in any way; treat her as a locked, untouched layer. Replace ONLY the background behind her. Keep her feet and the ground fully visible: place her on worn pale stone steps and paving in front of a weathered Provencal wooden door with a small cafe table to one side, so her feet rest naturally on the steps. Soft warm late-afternoon Mediterranean light matching the existing light on her. Add a soft realistic contact shadow so she is grounded. Photographic, editorial, medium-format film look, fine grain, muted natural color, calm slow-fashion mood — a real photograph, never illustration or CGI. Vertical 2:3.
